discover_desc: The Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla is located in a quiet and easily accessible area near the A2 highway and Braunschweig-Wolfsburg Airport. Ideal for business travelers, conferences, family celebrations and relaxing city breaks.
accommodation_desc: Choose from Standard Rooms, Comfort Rooms and spacious Studio Rooms. Every room category combines comfort, functionality and modern amenities for productive workdays and relaxing nights.
wellness_desc: Unwind in the sauna and relaxation area or stay active with nearby running routes and a fitness center next to the hotel.
about_page_title: About Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla
about_meta_description: Discover Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla – a comfortable hotel in Braunschweig offering accommodation, wellness, gastronomy and event facilities.
about_hero_desc: Comfortable stays for business travelers, families and weekend guests.
about_nature_desc: Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla is located in a quiet and easily accessible area near the A2 highway and just minutes from Braunschweig-Wolfsburg Airport. The hotel offers a welcoming atmosphere for both business and leisure travelers.
about_guest_title: A Stay Designed for Every Guest
about_guest_desc: Our hotel features Standard Rooms, Comfort Rooms and spacious Studio Rooms with modern amenities, comfortable interiors and thoughtful details. Whether for conferences, family celebrations or relaxing weekends, guests enjoy comfort and convenience throughout their stay.
about_location_desc: Braunschweig combines history, culture and green surroundings, making it an ideal destination for city breaks and business travel.
about_why3: Perfect for business and leisure stays
about_val1_desc: Modern Standard, Comfort and Studio Rooms designed for relaxation and productivity.
about_val2_desc: Relax in the sauna area or stay active with nearby running routes and fitness facilities.
about_val3_desc: Enjoy breakfast selections, seasonal restaurant dishes and relaxing evenings at the hotel bar.
about_val4_desc: Stylish venues and modern event spaces for weddings, family events, workshops and meetings.

contact_air_desc: Braunschweig-Wolfsburg Airport is located just a few minutes from the hotel.

gastro_page_title: Gastronomy | Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla
gastro_meta_description: Enjoy breakfast, seasonal cuisine and relaxing evenings at the restaurant and bar of Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla.
gastro_desc: Culinary experiences at Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla
gastro_overview_desc: Start your day with a varied breakfast buffet and enjoy seasonal dishes in our restaurant. Whether for business travelers or vacation guests, our gastronomy offers a welcoming atmosphere and enjoyable dining experiences throughout the day.
gastro_rest1_desc: Enjoy fresh rolls, hearty spreads, hot and cold dishes and a wide breakfast selection in a peaceful atmosphere.
gastro_rest2_desc: Relax and enjoy an extended breakfast experience during weekends and holidays with fresh and seasonal selections.
gastro_rest3_desc: Our restaurant serves seasonal dishes in a relaxed atmosphere, perfect for business dinners, couples and family evenings.
gastro_rest4_desc: Take a break and enjoy drinks, cocktails and relaxed evenings at the hotel bar after a productive or adventurous day.
gastro_cta_desc: Enjoy seasonal cuisine and welcoming hospitality at Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla.
ta_page_title: Explore Braunschweig | Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla
ta_meta_description: Discover the cultural and natural highlights around Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla including historic landmarks, parks and nearby attractions.
ta_desc: Discover culture, nature and history around the city of lions
ta_overview_desc: Braunschweig combines historic landmarks, charming cafés, green parks and cultural highlights. Guests can explore cathedrals, castles, museums and nearby nature areas while enjoying a perfect mix of city life and relaxation.
ta_attr1_desc: One of the city's most iconic landmarks with impressive medieval architecture and historical significance.
ta_attr2_desc: A reconstructed medieval castle showcasing the rich history of Braunschweig and the region.
ta_attr3_desc: A modern automotive and cultural destination with exhibitions, experiences and family-friendly attractions.
ta_attr4_desc: A peaceful nature reserve perfect for relaxing walks, cycling and discovering local wildlife.
ta_attr5_desc: A beautiful green park ideal for outdoor activities, jogging and relaxing moments in nature.
ta_cta_desc: Discover history, nature and culture while staying at Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla.
ta_cathedral_modal: Braunschweig Cathedral is one of the most important medieval churches in northern Germany and a symbol of the city.
ta_castle_modal: Dankwarderode Castle reflects the history of Henry the Lion and the medieval heritage of Braunschweig.
ta_autostadt_modal: Autostadt Wolfsburg offers exhibitions, automotive experiences, architecture and entertainment for all ages.
ta_riddagshausen_modal: The Riddagshausen Nature Area features lakes, trails and protected habitats for birds and wildlife.
ta_burgerpark_modal: Bürgerpark is a popular green oasis offering walking paths, recreation areas and scenic landscapes.

rooms_meta: Comfortable rooms at Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla including Standard Rooms, Comfort Rooms and Studio Rooms.
rooms_desc: Comfortable stays with modern amenities and relaxing spaces
rooms_text: Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla offers welcoming accommodation for business travelers and vacation guests. Choose from Standard Rooms, Comfort Rooms and spacious Studio Rooms designed with modern interiors, workspaces and relaxing amenities.
room_standard_desc: Comfortable room with double or twin beds, TV, desk, coffee and tea station and a bathroom with shower or bathtub.
room_comfort_desc: Stylish room with modern furnishings, relaxing atmosphere and enhanced comfort for business and leisure stays.
room_studio_desc: Spacious two-level studio with living area, twin beds, walk-in closet and modern bathroom.
room_single_desc: Ideal for solo travelers with cozy single bed, workspace, free Wi-Fi and modern amenities.

hotel_comfort_modal: Modern room with stylish furnishings, relaxing atmosphere and enhanced comfort for business and leisure travelers.
hotel_studio_modal: Spacious two-level studio with living area, walk-in closet, twin beds, workspace and modern bathroom.
hotel_single_modal: Perfect for solo travelers with cozy single bed, free Wi-Fi, TV, coffee station and functional workspace.
cta_desc: Relax in comfort and enjoy your stay at Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla.
spa_hero_text: Relax, recharge and enjoy peaceful moments in Braunschweig
spa_overview_title: A Relaxing Escape for Body & Mind
spa_overview_text: In our wellness area, you can relax and leave your daily worries behind. Treat yourself to some downtime in our sauna and relaxation area. Right along the canal near the hotel, you'll find beautiful running routes for your outdoor workouts. Guests can also use the gym next to the hotel for a small fee of €5.00.
spa_sauna_text: Relax and recharge in our peaceful sauna area after a productive day or exciting city trip.
spa_relax_text: Enjoy calm surroundings and quiet moments in our comfortable relaxation spaces.
spa_running_text: Explore scenic running and walking routes along the nearby canal for refreshing outdoor workouts.
spa_sauna_hours:
Sauna
Monday to Sunday from 5:00 p.m. to 10:00 p.m.
spa_fitness_hours:
Fitness
Monday to Thursday from 7:00 a.m. to 08:00 p.m.
Friday from 7:00 a.m. to 07:00 p.m.
Saturday and Sunday from 9:00 a.m. to 02:00 p.m.
spa_cta_text: Experience comfort, relaxation and fitness at Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla.
excursions_meta_title: Excursions | Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla
excursions_meta_description: Discover Braunschweig, Wolfsburg and cultural attractions near Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla.
excursions_hero_text: Discover the cultural highlights and natural beauty around Braunschweig
excursions_overview_text: Braunschweig is the perfect destination for a varied weekend getaway. The City of Lions charms visitors with its historic old town, cathedral, Dankwarderode Castle and cozy cafés. Nature lovers will enjoy walks in Bürgerpark or the idyllic village of Riddagshausen. The surrounding area also offers exciting destinations including the Autostadt in Wolfsburg, museums, cycling and hiking trails and many cultural highlights.
excursions_card1_text: Discover Braunschweig's charming old town with beautiful architecture, cozy cafés and historical landmarks.
excursions_card2_text: Visit the famous Dankwarderode Castle and explore the cultural history of Braunschweig.
excursions_card3_text: Enjoy an exciting day trip to the Autostadt in Wolfsburg with exhibitions, museums and automotive experiences.
excursions_card4_text: Explore cycling trails, hiking paths and relaxing walks in Bürgerpark and Riddagshausen.
excursions_culture_text: Discover museums, historic churches, castles and local attractions that showcase the rich culture and heritage of Braunschweig.
excursions_nature_text: Enjoy cycling, hiking and peaceful outdoor activities in the scenic natural surroundings near the hotel.
excursions_cta_text: Experience culture, history and nature during your stay at Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla.
events_meta_title: Meetings & Events | Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla
events_meta_description: Host conferences, meetings and family celebrations at Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla.
events_hero_text: The ideal venue for conferences, meetings and celebrations in Braunschweig
events_overview_title: A Professional Setting for Every Occasion
events_overview_text1: Braunschweig Seminarius Hotel by Belvilla offers the perfect setting for successful conferences, workshops, meetings and private celebrations. Our modern event spaces provide a quiet and professional atmosphere for productive events and unforgettable moments.
events_overview_text2: Whether you are planning a business seminar, team-building event, wedding or family celebration, our experienced team and flexible event spaces ensure your event runs smoothly from beginning to end.
events_space1_text: Our modern conference spaces accommodate groups of up to 60 people and can be flexibly adapted to your event requirements.
events_space2_text: Celebrate weddings, birthdays and special occasions in stylish surroundings with personalized planning and attentive service.
events_space3_text: Professional technology, comfortable seating and a productive working atmosphere make our hotel ideal for meetings and workshops.
events_amenity1_text: Fully equipped event spaces with modern conference and presentation technology.
events_amenity2_text: Event rooms can be individually adapted for seminars, conferences and celebrations.
events_amenity3_text: Enjoy breakfast, restaurant dining and personalized catering options for your event.
events_amenity4_text: Guests can relax in our modern rooms after successful meetings and celebrations.
events_capacity_note: Our event team will gladly help customize the perfect setup for your occasion.
events_cta_text: Let our team help you create a successful conference, meeting or unforgettable celebration in Braunschweig.
